📡 Crisis Bridge — Share Report
Anyone with internet can scan this code to upload your report. They won't change the data — only relay it.
⚠️ Keep this screen open until someone scans the QR. Tap "Download" to save the image and share it via WhatsApp, SMS or print.
📷 Crisis Bridge — Scan Report
Point your camera at a Crisis Bridge QR code. The report will be uploaded automatically.

DEMO · TRL 4 FRIDA is a working prototype validated in lab with real backend (Supabase + PostGIS), multi-user real-time sync, offline-first. Production roadmap: YOLOv8 model, Sentinel-2/MAXAR integration, JWT auth, multi-region deployment.
